proposal: The National Pizza Union demands hazard pay for working every Friday. They are armed with rolling pins.

left.label: Negotiate
left.result_text: The union accepts a modest stipend and a ceremonial slice.

right.label: Ban unions
right.result_text: Rolling pins are confiscated. Morale drops faster than dough can rise.

proposal: Citizens demand a national referendum on pineapple pizza. The nation is bitterly divided.

left.label: Ban pineapple
left.result_text: Fruit on pizza is outlawed. A quiet faction plots in pizzeria basements.

right.label: Mandate pineapple
right.result_text: Every Friday pizza must include pineapple. Tourism brochures look confused.
